items: 200g halloumi, cut into cubes or strips
1 handful green beans, trimmed and roughly chopped
1 large handful of mint leaves, roughly chopped
½ cup pitted kalamata olives, roughly chopped
⅓ cup pumpkin seeds and/or sunflower seeds, toasted

steps: Prepare all raw salad ingredients (everything below EVOO). That is green beans (see note), cherry tomatoes, cucumbers, spring onions, mint leaves, dill, olives, seeds and salt+pepper.
Add cold salad ingredients into a large serving bowl and set aside.
Cook the risoni according to packet directions.
If you plan to blanch the green beans, set a timer for a minute or so less than the packet directions, and drop in green beans.
Once cooked, drain with a seive, rinse with cold water, then drop back into pot or a bowl and cover with 1 Tbsp of EVOO to coat and allow to cool.
Once cooled, add to the large salad bowl with the main ingredients.
Add all dressing ingredients into a bowl and whisk until emulsified.
Season with salt and pepper to taste and set aside.
Add 1 Tbsp of EVOO to a pan, and on a medium high heat, fry halloumi for 2-3 minutes each side until golden.
Drizzle with maple syrup and cook until syrup caramelises and coats halloumi, then cut the heat and set halloumi aside.
Pour ⅔ of dressing through salad and toss to combine.
Serve salad into a bowl, top with warm halloumi and drizzle on remaining dressing.

notes: If you'd prefer to have the beans cooked slightly, drop them in the risoni pasta water in the last 90 seconds of cooking and drain with risoni.

recipe_info.title: Golden Halloumi Bowl with Summer Vegetables and Risoni
recipe_info.intro: A light and refreshing, yet hearty vegetarian salad. It takes a little while to chop and prep everything, but makes for a tasty weeknight meal!
